about.label: About Leapsun
about.headline: A New Paradigm in Strategic Partnership
about.body1: Leapsun Partners is a strategic platform focused on connecting people, capital, and transformative ideas. We operate at the intersection of global markets, emerging industries, and long-term value creation.
about.body2: Our approach is built on deep industry expertise, trusted relationships, and a relentless focus on building partnerships that endure.

items.title: The GLP-1 Revolution: Long-Acting Biologics and the Race to Redefine Metabolic Medicine
items.excerpt: With semaglutide and tirzepatide driving record prescription volumes globally, China's homegrown long-acting GLP-1 agonists — led by NDA-stage candidates targeting both type-2 diabetes and obesity — are entering a pivotal regulatory window in 2025. Differentiated dosing profiles and manufacturing cost advantages could position domestic innovators as serious challengers in a market projected to surpass $150B by 2030.

items.title: The 400G+ Race: Optical Communication Chips as the Unseen Engine of AI Infrastructure
items.excerpt: As hyperscalers deploy GPU clusters at unprecedented density, silicon photonics and high-speed SerDes solutions have become critical bottlenecks — and investment opportunities — in the AI era. Chinese optical IC designers with Silicon Valley DNA are closing the performance gap on global incumbents, addressing a $12B optical transceiver market growing at 28% CAGR driven entirely by AI cluster interconnect demand.

items.title: China's 2025 Consumption Recovery: Why Full-Stack E-Commerce Operations Are the New Infrastructure Play
items.excerpt: Five years of platform maturation across Tmall, Douyin Commerce and Pinduoduo have created a service layer where full-stack operators are capturing outsized margin as brand marketing spend normalises. Providers managing end-to-end GMV — from traffic acquisition through to last-mile fulfilment — for 200+ global brands are now filing for public listings, signalling institutional recognition of this structural shift.

items.title: Europe–Asia Health Brands: Pathways into China's $70B Premium Wellness Market
items.excerpt: Post-pandemic health consciousness has permanently elevated Chinese consumer spending on premium supplements, functional nutrition and personalised wellness. EU-certified brands entering through cross-border e-commerce face a shorter regulatory path than domestic registration, while strategic distribution partnerships offer immediate access to China's 400M+ urban middle-class consumers seeking trusted international quality credentials.
